intro: Johrenia distans, also known as Spreading Joint Pine or Desert Broom, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate joint pain, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Johrenia distans include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Johrenia distans is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil to create a topical treatment for joint pain and inflammation, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
